text.tspan: Figure 1. FlowAgent: LLM-orchestrated bioinformatics pipelines with autonomous error recovery and end-to-end benchmarking.
Natural-language prompt → LLM planner → structured workflow plan
GEO and run a human RNA-seq
Auto-routed between agent and workflow modes via an LLM classifier (model = user-configured).
Swept across 33 provider × model combinations (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google families).
: smart-resume found valid cached outputs from a prior run.
(real case: tximport Ensembl version-suffix mismatch → + ignoreTxVersion=TRUE).
unrecoverable data fault (e.g. truncated FASTQ); LLM correctly declined to "fix" corrupt input.
Executor backends: local shell · Nextflow · Snakemake · SLURM · SGE · Kubernetes.
Python SyntaxError / ImportError in imported code → structured refusal without an LLM call.
The recovery harness distinguishes five outcomes:
(most dangerous class — plausible but wrong fix).
28-fault injection catalogue across 3 tiers: easy (15), hard (9), unrecoverable (4 — correct answer is refusal).
Same mechanism enables runtime LLM-authored scripts (e.g. DESeq2 R code from actual sample IDs).
Five-pronged benchmark harness with reproducible figures
41 prompts × 33 models × 3 replicates — plan scoring + per-cell token tally.
28 injected faults × 3 tiers (easy / hard / unrecoverable) — recovery rate & taxonomy.
Plan → Nextflow / Snakemake codegen; syntax-valid and intent-preserving.
Six backends: local · Nextflow · Snakemake · SLURM · SGE · Kubernetes.
Same prompt corpus, same scoring: FlowAgent · BioMaster · AutoBA.
git SHA · Python + package versions · model IDs · timestamp · random seeds · redacted env snapshot.
Deterministic rescore / merge / report pipeline: re-score archived runs against current metrics without re-spending API budget.
Palette: Okabe-Ito colour-blind-safe. Editable SVG — open in Inkscape / Illustrator / Figma to refine labels or panel sizes before submission.
